channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ondo Poly Graduates Face Long Delays in Certificate Issuance
item.description: Plenty graduates wey finish from Rufus Giwa Polytechnic, Owo (RUGIPO) don dey vex as dem never fit collect their academic certificates even years after dem graduate. Some of these alumni don finish fr...

item.description: On Friday, the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) urged county governments to strengthen transparency and accountability systems as part of efforts to drive industrial development and econom...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal Reflects on Five Years Since King Zwelithini's Passing and Recent Local Incidents
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal marked the fifth anniversary of the passing of King Goodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu, who died on 12 March 2021 at Inkosi Albert Luthuli Central Hospital in Durban. Celebrated as a cultur...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Faces Water Shortages as Demand Outpaces Supply
item.description: Dar es Salaam is currently facing serious water shortages due to the gap between water production and the increasing demand from the city and Coast Region. According to Dawasa, the city needs around 7...

item.title: Effective Storage Solutions for Maintaining Organized Workshops
item.description: Maintaining an organized workshop is critical for efficiency and productivity. Tools, parts, and equipment are frequently handled by maintenance and manufacturing workers, sometimes hundreds of times ...

item.title: Severe COVID-19 or Influenza Linked to Elevated Lung Cancer Risk
item.description: New research from the University of Virginia Health System reveals that severe cases of COVID-19 or influenza can significantly increase the risk of lung cancer months or years later. Scientists, led ...

item.title: Marty Supreme: A Contemporary Reflection on Nostalgia and Modern Life
item.description: Marty Supreme, directed by Josh Safdie, is a film set in the 1950s that resonates strongly with the anxieties and cultural dynamics of 2026. While it centres on the declining sport of table tennis, th...

item.title: Anthropic's Dispute with Pentagon Highlights Evolving Tech Stance on Military AI
item.description: Anthropic has sued the US Department of Defense, alleging that its blacklisting from government contracts violates first amendment rights. This stems from a months-long standoff where Anthropic refuse...

item.title: North Bay tenant struggles to find affordable housing after accepting $40K move-out offer
item.description: Shannon Lucas, a tenant in North Bay, Ontario, accepted a $40,000 'cash for keys' offer from his landlord to move out of his townhouse after eight years. The offer came following a dispute over the la...

item.title: Philippines moves to control electricity prices amid LNG supply disruptions
item.description: The Philippine government is considering interventions in the power sector as liquefied natural gas (LNG) prices hit their highest levels since 2022 due to disruptions in Middle East shipping and a ha...

item.title: Cobhams Asuquo to perform live in Abuja alongside Johnny Drille, Timi Dakolo, and Korede Bello

item.title: Analysis of the White House's Communication on the Iran Conflict
item.description: The Sky News podcast highlights growing concerns about the tone of the Trump administration regarding the conflict with Iran. The White House has been posting content that appears to trivialize milita...

item.title: Specialized Farm Machines Designed for Efficiency and Practicality
item.description: Farm machinery extends far beyond the familiar tractors and harvesters. On working farms, a wide variety of specialized machines exist, each designed to perform a very specific task efficiently and re...

item.title: Pakistan Level ODI Series Against Bangladesh With Convincing Win in Rain-Hit Match
item.description: In the second ODI at Sher-e-Bangla National Cricket Stadium, Pakistan secured a commanding 128-run victory over Bangladesh through the Duckworth-Lewis-Stern (DLS) method after rain interrupted the gam...

item.description: Major-General Richard Shibiri, head of organised crime at the South African Police Service, provided a detailed account of how organised crime networks infiltrate and compromise law enforcement struct...

item.title: PAGASA Forecast: Amihan Causes Cloudy Skies and Light Rain Across Luzon and Visayas
item.description: The Northeast Monsoon, locally known as Amihan, continues to influence the weather over Luzon and Visayas, according to PAGASA’s daily forecast issued early Friday morning. Residents in Bicol, Eastern...

item.title: Succession Struggles in ODM After Raila Odinga's Death Likened to Greek Tragedy
item.description: Hii article inachunguza drama la kisiasa ndani ya ODM na familia ya Odinga baada ya kifo cha Raila Odinga mnamo Oktoba 2025. Inatumia mfano wa Greek tragedy kuonyesha jinsi mambo yalivyoanza vibaya na...

item.title: PU Colleges to Implement Child Protection Committees and Counsellor Support Systems
item.description: The Karnataka State Commission for Protection of Child Rights (KSCPCR) has identified significant gaps in safeguarding measures in Pre-University (PU) colleges across the State. To address issues such...

item.title: The Life Lessons My Mother Taught Me About Enjoying Life’s Little Luxuries
item.description: The author reflects on the invaluable life lesson imparted by her mother: it is perfectly acceptable to indulge in small luxuries and treat oneself. Her mother, despite growing up in a large, financia...
